items.summary: Marco Silva agrees to become Benfica's new head coach as the Portuguese club formalises Jose Mourinho's departure for Real Madrid.

items.title: Bukayo Saka in World Cup injury fear as Thomas Tuchel admits Arsenal star cannot play full 90 minutes for England
items.summary: BUKAYO SAKA is a massive fitness worry ahead of the World Cup — and still not able to play 90 minutes. items.title: Arsenal will be forced to DESTROY Prem transfer record to sign Julian Alvarez as Real Madrid have £130m bid rejected
items.summary: ARSENAL will have to smash the British transfer record if they want to sign Julian Alvarez. Real Madrid last night saw a whopping £130MILLION bid rejected by rivals Atletico Madrid for the Argentine superstar. items.title: Lionesses bemoan 'toughest group' as World Cup hopes hang in the balance
items.summary: Sarina Wiegman and multiple England stars rued the 'toughest' World Cup qualifying group after failing to earn an automatic spot in next year's tournament despite winning five of their six games.

items.title: England miss out on automatic World Cup spot - so what happens now?
items.summary: England beat Ukraine 3-0 on Tuesday night but it did not matter what they did as automatic qualification for the 2027 Women's World Cup was out of their hands.

items.title: ‘Ridiculous’ price for a beer at England’s first World Cup match against Croatia revealed
items.summary: THREE Lions fans will pay up to $16.95 (£12.62) for a beer at the team’s first match venue.  Imported options — such as Stella Artois — come with the price-tag at the glitzy AT&T Stadium in Arlington near Dallas.  The local Michelob Ultra or Budweiser will be $15.95 (£11.88) a US pint
